depends_on.name: element_id
depends_on.documentation: The document ID of the element (e.g., probe) this neuron was recorded from.

fields.name: cluster_index
fields.documentation: The cluster index assigned to this neuron by a spike sorter.

fields.name: number_of_channels
fields.documentation: Number of recording channels contributing to this unit's waveform (e.g., the tetrode/probe channel count).

fields.name: number_of_samples_per_channel
fields.documentation: Number of time samples per channel in mean_waveform / waveform_sample_times.

fields.name: mean_waveform
fields.documentation: Mean spike-waveform matrix shaped (number_of_samples_per_channel x number_of_channels) -- samples down rows, channels across columns. Recorded in the original A/D units of the source data.

fields.name: waveform_sample_times
fields.documentation: Time stamp of each sample in mean_waveform (seconds, in the element's local clock); length equals number_of_samples_per_channel.

fields.name: quality_label
fields.documentation: Human-readable spike-sorting quality label (e.g., 'good', 'multi', 'noise'). Candidate for promotion to ontology_term once a controlled vocabulary (e.g., a spike-sorting quality branch in NIFSTD) is registered.

fields.name: quality_number
fields.documentation: Numeric spike-sorting quality grade (e.g., 1-4) paired with quality_label. Sorter-specific scale.
